Name: Average time for Completed + Cancelled
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Completed + Cancelled and the end of the case

Name: Total time for Completed + Cancelled
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Completed + Cancelled and the end of the case

Name: Minimum time for Completed + Cancelled
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Completed + Cancelled and the end of the case

Name: Time of Completed + Cancelled
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Completed + Cancelled and the end of the case

Name: Completed + Cancelled Cycle Time
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Completed + Cancelled and the end of the case

Name: Average time from Completed + Cancelled to Completed + Closed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + Cancelled' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Total time from Completed + Cancelled to Completed + Closed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Completed + Cancelled' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Minimum time from Completed + Cancelled to Completed + Closed
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Completed + Cancelled' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Average time between Completed + Cancelled and Accepted + In Progress
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Completed + Cancelled'

Name: Total time between Completed + Cancelled and Accepted + In Progress
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Completed + Cancelled'

Name: Minimum time between Completed + Cancelled and Accepted + In Progress
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Completed + Cancelled'

Name: Average time it takes Completed + Cancelled after the execution of Accepted + Wait - User
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - User' and activity 'Completed + Cancelled'

Name: Total time it takes Completed + Cancelled after the execution of Accepted + Wait - Implementation
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - Implementation' and activity 'Completed + Cancelled'

Name: Minimum time it takes Completed + Cancelled after the execution of Accepted + Wait - Vendor
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor' and activity 'Completed + Cancelled'

Name: Average time until Completed + Cancelled is performed in variants ending with Completed + Cancelled
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Queued + Awaiting Assignment and activity Completed + Cancelled for cases where activity Completed + Cancelled occurs

Name: Total time until Completed + Cancelled is performed in variants containing Queued + Awaiting Assignment followed by Completed + Cancelled
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + Cancelled'

Name: Minimum time until Completed + Cancelled is performed in variants starting with Accepted + In Progress and ending with Completed + Cancelled
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Completed + Cancelled'

Name: Average time for Completed + Cancelled compared to the time for Completed + Resolved in identical process variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + Cancelled' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + Resolved occurs

Name: Total time for Completed + Cancelled compared to the time for Completed + In Call in variants that include both activities
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Completed + Cancelled' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Minimum time for Completed + Cancelled versus Minimum time for Completed + Closed in shared case trajectories
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Completed + Cancelled and the end of the case

Name: Time from Accepted + In Progress to Completed + Cancelled in variants where Completed + In Call does not occur
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Completed + Cancelled'

Name: Time from Accepted + In Progress to Completed + Cancelled in variants where Completed + In Call occurs earlier in the sequence
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Completed + Cancelled'

Name: Elapsed time between Completed + In Call and Completed + Cancelled when both appear in the same case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Completed + In Call' and activity 'Completed + Cancelled'

Name: Time of Completed + Cancelled in cases originating from high-impact incidents as recorded in the VINST system
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Completed + Cancelled and the end of the case

Name: Completed + Cancelled Cycle Time in cases handled by resources in Brazil versus France
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Completed + Cancelled' and the end of case grouped by the last value of resource country
